title: Elrood Bazaar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Elrood Bazaar''' was a profitable place of business on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]]. It served as an extremely large marketplace of sorts home to all kinds of businesses as well as the [[Elrood Sector Stock Exchange]]. The [[Daya]], the grand plaza of the Elrood Bazaar was where potential customers would linger before searching the buildings. The most notable architectural layout of the Elrood Bazaar was the [[Perma (buildings)|Perma]], a ring of buildings surrounding the Daya that had a permanent place in the Bazaar. [[Transsector Lines Ltd.|Transsector Lines Limited]] and the [[Professiona Artists Guild]] were both businesses which operated partially out of the Perma.
